dominants.dominant_desc: Focus on mid lane control. Use your passive to out-level enemies and poke safely. Farm efficiently, avoid unnecessary trades, and watch for ganks. Prioritize reaching level 4 quickly to unlock your ultimate.

Start roaming to side lanes and punishing isolated targets. Steal high-impact enemy ultimates to turn small skirmishes into kills. Help your team secure turtles and contest objectives without overcommitting.

Position behind frontliners in team fights, targeting squishy carries with your burst and stolen ultimates. Avoid diving alone—survival is key. Use Flicker + dash to escape or engage at the right moment.
Focus on maximizing stolen ultimates, disrupting enemy formations, and zoning priority targets. Valentina excels at punishing mistakes rather than initiating fights.

emblems.emblem_desc: For Valentina, the Magic Emblem talents Agility, Bargain Hunter, and Impure Rage perfectly support her solo-queue playstyle. Agility increases her movement speed, helping her dodge ganks, reposition safely, and engage or escape during fights. Bargain Hunter gives her discount to items, allowing her to reach her power spikes faster and dominate mid lane independently. Impure Rage boosts her magic damage, enhancing her burst potential and making her deadly in skirmishes, especially when combined with stolen ultimates. Together, these talents maximize her mobility, early-game strength, and fight impact.

equips.equip_desc: Magic Boots and Enchanted Talisman for CD reduction. It helps you to do double skill 1 faster. Glowing wand for extra damage and anti-regen. Holy Crystal extra magic power for bursting enemy heroes. Divine Glaive for penetration and Winter Crown for survival. You can change Winter Crown for Blood Wings or Immortality depending on what you need more.

hero.hero_overview: Valentina is often played in coordinated team setups, but she is also highly effective for solo players. Her strong early-game pressure and bonus EXP let her gain advantages on her own, while her ability to steal enemy ultimates allows her to adapt and make plays without relying on team synergy. With good positioning and smart ultimate choices, Valentina can control mid lane, punish mistakes, and carry solo-queue games despite limited coordination.
hero.hero_strength: Valentina remains a top-tier mage due to her unmatched adaptability and playmaking potential. Her ability to steal enemy ultimates allows her to counter almost any lineup, giving her consistent value even in unpredictable solo-queue games. With bonus EXP from her passive, she reaches power spikes earlier, dominates mid lane, and rotates efficiently without relying on team coordination. Strong burst damage, crowd control, and mobility enable her to punish mistakes, control fights, and shift momentum on her own, making her a reliable and high-impact pick for skilled players.
hero.hero_weakness: Despite her strengths, Valentina is a fragile, high-risk mage who is heavily punished by poor positioning. She relies greatly on player decision-making, as stealing the wrong ultimate or mistiming it can cost crucial fights. Against lineups with low-impact or situational ultimates, her value decreases noticeably. She is also vulnerable to burst assassins and heavy crowd control, especially when caught without her dash, making map awareness and positioning essential for consistent performance.

data.recommend: This guide is highly recommended for players who want to master Valentina in solo queue and maximize her impact in ranked games.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is Valentina best battle spell because it gives her instant repositioning to escape assassins, avoid crowd control, or set up surprise plays with stolen ultimates. It enhances her survivability in solo queue and allows clutch engages when combined with her dash. Use Flicker wisely for critical moments, as staying alive and well-positioned is key to maintaining her impact.

And vengeance, it's technically an unorthodox but still effective depending on your situation in draft pick, like when the enemy uses non mobile heroes but usually for sustained fights.

hero.hero_overview: Valentina is a mage hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang known for her ability to steal enemy ultimates, making her one of the most versatile heroes in the game. As a powerful mid-laner, she excels in poking enemies, sustaining in fights, and turning the tide with her ultimate.
hero.hero_strength:
Ultimate Steal: I Am You lets her copy enemy ultimates, giving her adaptability in fights.

Strong Laning Phase: Her passive (Primal Force) provides sustain, allowing her to out-trade many mid-laners.

High Mobility: Arcane Shade grants dashes, helping her reposition or escape threats.

Team Fight Impact: She can disrupt battles by stealing key ultimates from heroes like Pharsa or Atlas.


Hero Weaknesses

Skill-Dependent: Choosing the right ultimate and using it effectively requires game awareness.

Vulnerable to Burst Damage: Assassins and burst mages can take her down quickly.

Struggles Against Low-Impact Ultimates: If enemies have weak ultimates, her I Am You loses value.

Mana Hungry: Valentina consumes a lot of mana early, requiring careful management.
hero.hero_weakness:
Skill-Dependent: Valentina requires precise execution, as her effectiveness depends on choosing the right enemy ultimate.

Vulnerable to Burst Damage: Despite her sustain, she can be easily eliminated by assassins or burst mages if caught off-guard.

Struggles Against Low-Impact Ultimates: If enemies have weak ultimates (e.g., basic buffs or mobility skills), her I Am You may not be as effective.

Mana Dependency: Valentina consumes a lot of mana early game, requiring careful resource management.

Valentina excels in strategic play and rewards players who can make quick decisions on which ultimate to steal and how to use it effectively in fights.

data.recommend: This will help you play Valentina efficiently

spell.spell_desc: The Blink spell instantly teleports the hero a short distance in the chosen direction, allowing for quick escapes, chases, or repositioning in battle. While Valentina already has Arcane Shade for mobility, Flicker is usually preferred over Blink as a Battle Spell since it provides instant repositioning without interrupting her combos. However, Blink can still be useful for quick escapes or aggressive plays in specific situations.

hero.hero_overview: As a agressive mid laner, when you are using Valentina in this kind of situation, all you need to do is always make a way to provide space for your jungler and gold laner, also if their is s turtle fight, learn to gank the turtle lane to give dome spaces for securing the objectives. After a 8 minute mark, you can upgrade your boots into roaming boots and find a traits that is suitable for your needs. In this part, I want to choose dire hit for additional damage dealt to the enemies hero.
hero.hero_strength: As I said earlier, valentina has a high mobility heroes that can fight in early to mid game but careful in late game. For the first turtle, you need to give space for your jungler in securing objectives by helping your teamates in exp lane that the turtle is near to spawn. It also has a strength to outplay heroes if u used it very well.
hero.hero_weakness: There is a disadvantages in using this hero if their is so much assassin heroes who has not a ultimate that can used to counter it if it is being agressive. Also, having such crowd control in enemy composition that can counter this hero in a team fight setting

data.title: TOP PH VALENTINA GUIDE

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Khaleed has strong early game damage, combo with Valentina and you can kill anyone early game, even the tanks.

counters.counter_desc: No counters. Valentina is the ultimate hero counter.

dominants.dominant_desc: Try and catch an enemy hero alone so that all of the damage from your second skill, Arcane Shade hits them. This allows you to poke the enemy out extremely easily. Hitting enemies also allows you to heal back some HP and gain some EXP, rewarding you for poking the enemies.

emblems.emblem_desc: The mage emblem is the strongest emblem for mages, offering many necessary things for Valentina. The penetration and raw magic power helps her out a lot in the early game. Agility is picked because as a mage you need to rotate a lot, so movement speed is more than welcome. Tenacity will help you survive any encounter with assassins. Impure rage actually works with your passive, allowing you to heal off the extra damage dealt. The mana regeneration passive helps early game as well.

The mage emblem is the strongest emblem for mages, offering many necessary things for Valentina. The penetration and raw magic power helps her out a lot in the early game. Wilderness blessing is picked because as a mage you need to rotate a lot, so movement speed is more than welcome. Rupture will allow you to deal more damage throughout the game. Impure rage actually works with your passive, allowing you to heal off the extra damage dealt. The mana regeneration passive helpful early game too.

equips.equip_desc: Tough boots will help lane versus the opposing mage early game, and the cc reduction will allow you to escape from many situations. Enchanted Talisman reduces her cooldown and allows her to poke more often. Glowing Wand improves her poke and has an anti heal effect allowing you to counter many heros. Blood Wings is the main item for sustain, giving her a huge shield and movement speed. Divine Glaive allows you to counter any magic defense the enemy has built. Holy Crystal will improve her burst.

hero.hero_overview: Valentina has the most unique kit in the game, with the ability to steal the ultimate of any enemy hero. This allows her to be especially strong in the drafting phase in two ways. If you pick her early, it prevents the enemies from picking heros with strong ultimates. You can also use her as a counter pick when they have already picked such hero with strong ultimates.
hero.hero_strength: Valentina has the strongest early game burst. At level 2 she is able to out damage and out sustain every other mid laner due to her passive which heals her every time she does damage to the enemies. Her passive gives her extra EXP, so by poking the enemy constantly with her dash she can easily get ahead. Her double dash allows her to counter assassins as well. Valentina is the only mage with not only one but two dashes.
hero.hero_weakness: Valentina is weak in the mid game, when the enemy start building magic defense. Until you purchase divine glaive for penetration, her damage fall off significantly, only returning once you purchase magic penetration.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker allows Valentina to make plays and quickly respond if a teammate makes plays. It also allows her to quickly escape from enemies. Paired with her double dash, this makes her almost impossible to catch. Of course if the enemy bring heros with extremely strong cc, purify will be needed instead.
